current_paper_values.BIC_note: Approximate diagnostic only; exact BIC requires an explicitly defined effective data count.

no_H0_collapse_tendency.interpretation: alpha_R shifts toward zero when the local H0_obs driver is removed, but the compact no-H0 q95(alpha_R)=0.0497 exceeds the configured q95<=0.03 collapse pass threshold. This supports a collapse tendency, not a configured-threshold pass.

claim_discipline.allowed_current_wording: Tier-A1 supports a working H0_obs calibration-drift mechanism in late-only data: alpha_R activates when the local observed-frame H0_obs likelihood is included, and the no-H0 control shifts alpha_R toward zero. The current compact no-H0 summary has q95(alpha_R)=0.0497, which exceeds the configured q95<=0.03 collapse pass threshold, so the no-H0 result supports a collapse tendency rather than a configured-threshold collapse pass.
claim_discipline.not_allowed_as_current_Tier_A1_claim: EDCL decisively resolves the Hubble tension.
